goal: Review and refine the EVR module extraction spec at docs/extraction/spec.md. The problem: our nakama fork has 332+104 EVR-specific files embedded in the nakama source tree. The goal is to extract all EVR code into a standalone Go module that imports heroiclabs/nakama as a library. There's a stale prototype at andrew@spriffy:/home/andrew/src/nevr/ that shows the target architecture. The spec describes current state, constraints, and risks. Don't author the architecture — identify gaps, clarify scope, and recommend next steps for the architects (Sanjay/Kai).
